'''fajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:urgingly|urgingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-j-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:urgingly|urgingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:fajate|fajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fajatesher|fajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fajatesherĂ«m|fajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fajatero|fajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fajateshĂ«|fajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fajateshĂ«m|fajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifajatero|gokifajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifajateshĂ«|gokifajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifajateshĂ«m|gokifajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofajankerom|gofajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofajankeshĂ«|gofajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofajankeshĂ«m|gofajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofajankeya|gofajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fajaterom|fajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fajatemu|fajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fajateya|fajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifajaterom|gokifajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifajatemu|gokifajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifajateya|gokifajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:fajajate|fajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fajajatesher|fajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fajajatesherĂ«m|fajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fajajatero|fajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fajajateshĂ«|fajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fajajateshĂ«m|fajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifajajatero|gokifajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifajajateshĂ«|gokifajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifajajateshĂ«m|gokifajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofajajankerom|gofajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofajajankeshĂ«|gofajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofajajankeshĂ«m|gofajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofajajankeya|gofajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fajajaterom|fajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fajajatemu|fajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fajajateya|fajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifajajaterom|gokifajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifajajatemu|gokifajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifajajateya|gokifajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:fĂŠjĂŠte|fĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fĂŠjĂŠtesher|fĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|fĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠjĂŠtero|fĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|fĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|fĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠjĂŠtero|gokifĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokifĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokifĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofĂŠjĂŠnkerom|gofĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|gofĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gofĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofĂŠjĂŠnkeya|gofĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠjĂŠterom|fĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠjĂŠtemu|fĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fĂŠjĂŠteya|fĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠjĂŠterom|gokifĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokifĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifĂŠjĂŠteya|gokifĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:fafjafte|fafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fafjaftesher|fafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafjaftesherĂ«m|fafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafjaftero|fafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fafjafteshĂ«|fafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafjafteshĂ«m|fafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafjaftero|gokifafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifafjafteshĂ«|gokifafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafjafteshĂ«m|gokifafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofafjafnkerom|gofafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofafjafnkeshĂ«|gofafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafjafnkeshĂ«m|gofafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofafjafnkeya|gofafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafjafterom|fafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafjaftemu|fafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fafjafteya|fafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafjafterom|gokifafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafjaftemu|gokifafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifafjafteya|gokifafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
